title: The Cannabis Enigma
description: Scientific deep-dives into cannabis research from one of the world's leading medical institutions. Topics include endocannabinoid system biology, clinical trials, and therapeutic applications.

title: Cannabis Nursing Solutions
description: Focused on clinical cannabis education for healthcare providers. Covers dosing principles, patient consultation frameworks, and emerging research in an accessible format.

title: Shaping Fire
description: Conversations with scientists, growers, and industry leaders exploring the science and culture of cannabis. Strong focus on terpenes, cultivar effects, and the entourage effect.

title: CannaInsider
description: Long-running industry podcast covering business, science, and policy. Useful for understanding the broader cannabis ecosystem — dispensaries, extraction, lab testing, and regulations.

title: MJBizCon
description: The cannabis industry's largest trade show. Covers business strategy, regulatory updates, and product innovation. Held annually in Las Vegas.

title: Cannabis Science Conference
description: Science-first conference bringing together researchers, clinicians, and industry professionals. Strong focus on clinical studies, pharmacology, and patient outcomes.

title: CannMed
description: Medical-focused cannabis conference for physicians, researchers, and patient advocates. Emphasis on clinical evidence, patient cases, and regulatory perspectives.

title: WeedCon
description: Consumer-focused cannabis expo with product showcases, education panels, and community programming. Great for staying current on product trends and patient advocacy.

title: Cannabis and Cannabinoid Research
description: Peer-reviewed journal covering clinical and basic science research. Free abstracts — the gold standard for evidence-based cannabis wellness discussions.

title: Leafly News
description: Consumer-accessible cannabis news covering legalization, product reviews, research summaries, and wellness topics. Useful for staying current without needing a science background.

title: MJBizDaily
description: Business-focused cannabis industry news — market data, regulatory updates, licensing, and investment trends. Essential reading for understanding the industry landscape.

title: Marijuana Moment
description: Policy and politics news covering federal and state cannabis legislation. Best source for regulatory changes that affect patients and the healthcare ecosystem.

title: The Endocannabinoid System Explained
description: Comprehensive lecture covering how the endocannabinoid system works, receptor types (CB1, CB2), and how cannabinoids modulate pain, mood, and sleep pathways.

title: Terpenes & the Entourage Effect
description: Scientific overview of how terpenes interact with cannabinoids to modify and enhance therapeutic effects. Covers linalool, myrcene, caryophyllene, and limonene in detail.

title: Cannabis & Sleep: What the Research Shows
description: Evidence-based overview of cannabis use for sleep disorders. Covers CBN, CBD, and THC's effects on REM sleep, sleep latency, and long-term sleep quality.
